overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a stormy medieval village at dusk, passing wooden longhouses and NPCs, then continuing into open grasslands with distant mountains. The scene features heavy rainfall, atmospheric fog, and transitions from enclosed village paths to expansive wilderness.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village path with wooden fences and thatched cottages

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the village dirt path between wooden fences and past sitting villagers

notable_agents.action: villager sitting by the wooden fence near a small campfire

entered.detail: rough-hewn wooden fence lining the right side of the path
traditional wooden building with thatched roof and lit windows
misty mountains visible in the stormy background
wooden support structure and fence on the left side

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow village path flanked by wooden fences and traditional thatched cottages. The stormy dusk atmosphere creates a moody blue-grey palette, with misty mountains visible in the distance. NPC villagers sit by campfires along the fence line as the character moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: village longhouse area transitioning to open fields

events.description: passing the large wooden longhouse and exiting the village proper
entering open grassland, leaving village structures behind

agents.ego_description: walking past the large wooden longhouse and continuing toward the open countryside

notable_agents.action: villager in red clothing standing near the longhouse entrance

entered.detail: substantial wooden building with steep roof and warm interior lighting
low stone retaining wall along the left side of the path
expansive grassy plain opening up beyond the village

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes a large wooden longhouse with glowing windows, marking the edge of the village. A villager in red stands near the entrance. Beyond the stone walls and final fences, the landscape opens into expansive grasslands as the village structures fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with distant mountains and scattered wildlife

events.description: deer visible grazing in the open field to the left
terrain becomes more rugged with rocky outcrops and denser vegetation on the left

agents.ego_description: walking through open grassland, observing the landscape and wildlife while heading toward distant mountains

notable_agents.action: deer grazing in the grass field before moving away

entered.detail: small clusters of pine trees dotting the right side of the landscape
rocky hillside and boulders emerging on the left side of the path
dense forest visible in the valley below the mountain range

segments.scene_description: Geralt traverses the open grasslands surrounded by misty mountains and stormy skies. Deer graze peacefully in the fields before bounding away. The terrain gradually becomes more rugged with rocky outcrops and scattered pine trees lining the path as the character continues into the wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a moody, enclosed medieval village into a vast, rugged wilderness under a stormy dusk sky. It begins by tracking Geralt along a narrow path flanked by wooden fences and thatched cottages, where villagers huddle by campfires against a blue-grey atmospheric backdrop. As the character passes a large wooden longhouse with glowing windows, the village structures fall away and the scene opens into expansive, wind-swept grasslands. The camera then follows him across these open fields, passing grazing deer that bound away as the terrain gradually shifts toward a more rugged landscape. Finally, the path leads deeper into the wilderness, moving past rocky outcrops and scattered pine trees beneath the silhouette of misty mountains.
